operation: First, a rectangular box with dimensions 30 x 25 x 15 is created on the XY workplane. Next, an XZ workplane offset 12.5 units along the Y axis is used to draw an ellipse with radii 10 and 6, which is extruded 5 units, then this extruded elliptical feature is unioned to the base box. Finally, the face at the maximum Y coordinate is selected, and a shell operation with 3 unit wall thickness is performed to hollow the solid, leaving the selected face open.
geometry: The model is a uniform-thickness hollow structure composed of a rectangular prism base with an elliptical cross-section protrusion centered on one of its shorter vertical side faces. The part is open on the face opposite the elliptical protrusion, with consistent wall thickness across all closed surfaces.
function: This is a lightweight hollow enclosure housing designed for small electronic or sensor components, where the elliptical protrusion acts as a dedicated interface for cable pass-through, mounting, or port integration.
